Video.summary: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. This is followed by the very entertaining pro contest between the ever explosive Vyron Phillips taking on BJJ Black Belt Leo Xavier.

Video.summary: Have you ever wondered how Ronda Rousey deals with injuries? Hard Knocks fighter Jess Hopkins comes to Sports Condtioning coach Marie Michalski to learn techniques to strengthen her shoulders and improve the muscles in her legs for kicking.

Video.summary: An athlete is only as good as their coaches can make them. Hard Knocks star Jesse Arnett believes that Anderson Gonclaves is the reason he developped into a top contender for the UFC. This episode explores what makes Goncalves such an inspiration to his fighters.
